name: Iso11783PDDGetValue
title: Iso11783PDDGetValue
syntax: float Iso11783PDDGetValue( dword ecuHandle, dbSignal signal, dword elementNumber );
float Iso11783PDDGetValue( dword ecuHandle, dword ddi, dword elementNumber );
description: The function requests the value of a process variable.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must previously have been created with Iso11783CreateECU.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Signal from the database. The attribute ddimust be defined for the signal. The signal must be defined in the same database as the node!

return: Value of the process variable, 0 if the variable is not defined
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
